item.description: About me 👷‍♂️ Civil Engineer having interests in Structural Engineering, Structural Analysis and Design, Programming and Computer-Aided Design. Backed by a deep knowledge of engineering principles, but always keen on learning new skills and developing existing ones. Education MEng Civil Engineering, University of Patras Languages English Greek Contact me 📧 Want to get in touch? Feel free to send me an email and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
